name: Andy
bio: Lead guitarist. I write songs about driving at night and forgetting to text back. Currently obsessed with the Microphones and eating cereal for every meal.

name: "Something About That" — Debb and Winnie
bio: Our debut single. Recorded in a living room in Eagle Rock. About driving home and not wanting to get out of the car.
embedHtml: <iframe data-testid="embed-iframe" style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/track/6iQkWBTxyjMnFAidh7vzLQ?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="352" frameBorder="0" allowfullscreen="" allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>

name: Debb and Winnie — Live
distance: Coming to a city near you
bio: We tour. We sweat. We eat gas station snacks. Swipe right if you want to see us live.

name: Sam
bio: Bass player and reluctant adult. I believe in long drives, longer reverb tails, and the healing power of a good bassline. Will recommend you a record you've never heard of.

name: Seth
bio: Drums and percussion. I was the kid who tapped on every surface. Still am. I like the part of shows where no one is talking. Don't bring me to a brunch place with a wait.

name: Phoebe Bridgers
bio: I'll write a song about this date. It'll come out in 3 years. You'll know it's about you because I'll describe the exact sweater you're wearing right now.

name: Mac DeMarco
distance: Far away, probably on a boat
bio: Just a salami boy looking for someone to jam with in the garage. I will absolutely play guitar at your dinner party. Yes I do own more than one denim jacket.

name: Mitski
bio: I contain multitudes and also a lot of feelings about being perceived. Let's get dinner but please don't describe me to anyone afterward.

name: Kurt Vile
bio: Wakin on a pretty daze. Got a lotta guitar picks if u need one. My schedule is pretty open except when it's not. Let's hang sometime, no rush.

name: Side A EP — Debb and Winnie
bio: Four songs recorded over one weekend. We were eating cereal the whole time. This is what it sounds like.

name: "Late" (B-Side) — Debb and Winnie
bio: A b-side about being late to everything. Ironically, this one came out on time.
